hotels.name: Los Olivos Tent Camp
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Roboré, l’établissement Los Olivos Tent Camp comprend un jardin, un restaurant, un bar et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans l’ensemble de ses locaux. Cet hôtel propose des chambres familiales.

Un petit-déjeuner américain est servi sur place.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
About this property

Comfortable Accommodations: Los Olivos Tent Camp in Roboré offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and modern amenities. Each room includes a dining area, TV, and wardrobe, ensuring a pleasant stay.

Dining and Leisure: Guests can enjoy a restaurant serving American breakfast, a bar, and a lush garden. Free WiFi is available throughout the property, providing connectivity for all visitors.

Convenient Facilities: The hotel features an electric vehicle charging station, free on-site private parking, and room service. Additional amenities include a tea and coffee maker, microwave, and electric kettle.

Pet Friendly: Los Olivos Tent Camp welcomes pets, making it ideal for travellers with animals.
hotels.description_es:
Los Olivos Tent Camp se encuentra en Roboré y dispone de jardín, restaurante, bar y wifi gratis en todo el alojamiento. El hotel tiene habitaciones familiares.

En el hotel se puede disfrutar de un desayuno americano.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
Los Olivos Tent Camp localiza-se em Roboré e apresenta um jardim, restaurante, bar e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade. O alojamento tem quartos familiares.

Los Olivos Tent Camp disponibiliza pequeno-almoço americano aos seus hóspedes.

A distância mencionada na descrição do alojamento é calculada com o © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_it:
Situato a Roboré, Los Olivos Tent Camp presenta un giardino, un ristorante, un bar e il WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura. Questo hotel offre camere familiari.

Presso questo hotel potrete gustare una colazione americana.

Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con © OpenStreetMap
